response.justification: Strong full-stack candidate with 14+ years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators — a near-perfect match for the AI agent development requirement. Solid React, MongoDB, Docker, and TDD background. Missing explicit Nest.js and Vitest exposure, and no Kotlin, but the core stack alignment and demonstrated ability to pick the right tool make these gaps low-risk.
strengths: Direct AI agent / MCP development experience in current role
Deep TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB full-stack background
Strong engineering culture credentials: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, public speaking, workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js framework experience listed
No Vitest mentioned (Jest/testing experience implied but not specified)
No Kotlin experience; significant DLang focus is tangential to the target stack
